step_rationale: Plasmin-cleaved cross-linked fibrin; marker of fibrin deposition and fibrinolytic turnover in thrombosis.
mechanism: Cross-linked fibrin degradation products reflect active thrombus formation and fibrinolytic activity, indicating thrombus burden and complexity in MI.

references.title: The relationship of soluble fibrin and cross-linked fibrin degradation products to the clinical course of myocardial infarction.
Fibrin metabolism in patients with acute myocardial infarction during and after treatment with tissue-type plasminogen activator.
